title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE SURIGAO DEL SUR PROVINCIAL HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TANDAG, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL SUR, TO ADELA SERRA TY MEMORIAL HOSPITAL

chunks.text:
H. No. 29110 / 88 OG No. 24, 3733 (June 15, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7433, April 23, 1992 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE SURIGAO DEL SUR PROVINCIAL HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TANDAG, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL SUR, TO ADELA SERRA TY MEMORIAL HOSPITAL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Surigao del Sur Provincial Hospital in the Municipality of Tandag, Province of Surigao del Sur, is hereby changed to Adela Serra Ty Memorial Hospital.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.)

RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on January 23, 1991 and January 23, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.)

ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.)

CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: APRIL 23, 1992

(Sgd.)

CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
